title: Death Flies East
writer: Philip Wylie, Albert DeMond, Fred Niblo Jr.
actors: Conrad Nagel, Florence Rice, Raymond Walburn
plot: On a flight from California to New York, the passengers include Evelyn Vail (Florence Rice), a nurse on parole for a murder she did not commit, attempting to clear her name and bring the real killer to trial; and John Robinson Gor...
